block_00: Action required – Account review and withdrawal process
block_03: Following our last email in relation to your withdrawal request
block_04:
, we kindly like to remind you that in order to process your withdrawal request, you need to complete the required account review by following the below instructions.
It is crucial to note that failure to complete the account review within 15 days from the date of this notice will result in cancellation of the withdrawal request, closure of the trading account, and any open positions, in line with the Company's Terms and Conditions.
block_05: 1.    Please choose a suitable date and time for a video call with our representative
block_06: 2.    Enter the video call using the designated link and present yourself holding valid proof of identity (i.e. your passport or national ID card)
block_07: 3.    Answer all questions by providing true and accurate information.
block_08: Please do not disconnect the video call unless you completed these steps, otherwise, the review will be considered uncompleted.
block_09: For any inquiries, please contact the
block_11: as soon as possible and not later than 7 days from the date of this notice.
